channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran says it turns back US warship from Strait of Hormuz, US official denies missile strike
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran warns US of ‘crushing’ response over Hormuz
- Iran says no military solution to Hormuz crisis, warns against escalation
- Hormuz crisis reignites as Tehran targets UAE and US hits Iranian fast boats
- The Latest: United Arab Emirates warns of Iranian attacks as US claims progress in Strait of Hormuz
- Iran will be ‘blown off the face of the Earth’ if it intervenes in Hormuz: Trump says
- U.S. ships pass through Strait of Hormuz as Iran renews threats
- Iran fires 'warning shots' as US Navy says its ships entered Gulf via Hormuz
- War preparations under way in Iran as Hormuz tensions with US escalate
- Hormuz crisis reignites as Tehran targets UAE and US hits Iranian fast boats
- Iran says they will attack United States forces if they enter Strait of Hormuz
- Iran fires 'warning shots' as US Navy says its ships entered Gulf via Hormuz
- Iran fires 'warning shots' as US Navy says its ships entered Gulf via Hormuz
- Iran prevents entry of U.S. warships into Strait of Hormuz, Navy says
- Iran threatens ships that take up U.S. offer on Strait of Hormuz transit
- Iran prevents entry of U.S. warships into Strait of Hormuz, Navy says
- War preparations under way in Iran as Hormuz tensions with US escalate
- Trump’s Hormuz ‘protection’ seeks ‘pretext for escalation’: Iran

- Iranian military claims it prevented US Navy ships from entering Strait of Hormuz
- Iran issues Strait of Hormuz threat after Trump says US to guide vessels
- Iran warns US Navy against entering Strait of Hormuz
- Iranian military commander warns ‘supporters’ of US over Hormuz
- Iran says it fired missiles at US warship to prevent it entering Hormuz
- Missiles fired at U.S. frigate in Strait of Hormuz, claims Iranian media
- Urgent: Iran prepared for "any scenario" in Strait of Hormuz" after firing "first shots" at U.S. warship -- Tasnim
- Flash: Iran is prepared for "any scenario in Strait of Hormuz" after firing "first shots" at U.S. warship -- Tasnim
- Iran warns will attack US forces in Hormuz after Trump announces plan to guide ships
- Iran says it turns back US warship from Strait of Hormuz, US CENTCOM denies missile strike
- Iran Warns US Bound to Drown in Strait of Hormuz 'Quagmire'
- Iran prevents entry of U.S. warships into Strait of Hormuz, Navy says
- Iran Warns of Military Response as US Launches Naval Mission in Strait of Hormuz
- Iran military says US forces will be attacked if they enter Strait of Hormuz
- Iran Warns Will Attack US Forces In Hormuz After Trump Announces Escort Plan
- Iran threatens to attack US warships that enter Strait of Hormuz
- Iran threatens to attack US warships that enter Strait of Hormuz
- Iran warns US to stay out of Hormuz after Trump says US will ‘guide’ ships
- Iran warns U.S. army against entering Strait of Hormuz
- Iran warns US Navy against entering Strait of Hormuz
- Iran warns will attack US forces in Hormuz after Trump announces escort plan
- Iran vows kinetic response to Trump's ‘Project Freedom’ naval mission in Hormuz Strait
- US threatens sanctions over payments to Iran for Hormuz passage
- Iran warns US Navy to stay clear of Hormuz after Trump says US will help stranded ships
- Iran military says US forces will be attacked if they enter Strait of Hormuz
- Iran threatens action against US presence in Hormuz
- Iran war: US to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz
- Middle East crisis live: Iran warns it will attack US forces if they enter strait of Hormuz after Trump says US will help ‘guide’ stranded ships
- Iran military says U.S. forces will be attacked if they enter Strait of Hormuz
- Iran to consider any US attempt to interfere in Hormuz as ceasefire breach
- Iran urges ships to refrain from entering Hormuz Strait without Tehran’s permission
- Iran warns of ceasefire violation as US plans to escort Hormuz ships
- Iran warns of ceasefire violation as US plans to escort Hormuz ships
- Iran Warns US: Any Military Escort in Hormuz Is a 'Violation of the Ceasefire'
- Iran war live: Tehran warns Trump’s Hormuz mission violates ceasefire]]>

item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US Downs Iran Missiles And Drones, Destroys Six Of Tehran's Boats
- US destroys six Iranian small boats, shoots down missiles, drones, admiral says
- US military says it has sunk six Iranian small boats that were targeting civilian vessels in latest test of ceasefire
- US military says Iran has launched missiles, drones and small boats at ships the US is protecting in Strait of Hormuz
- U.S. Shot Down Iranian Missiles and Drones Aimed at American Vessels in Strait of Hormuz, Admiral Says
- U.S. Shot Down Iranian Missiles and Drones Aimed at American Vessels in Strait of Hormuz, Admiral Says
- US destroys six Iranian small boats, shoots down missiles, drones, admiral says
- US Forces Destroy 6 Iranian Small Boats, Shoot Down Missiles, Drones: Admiral
- Roundup: Iran says it fired missiles, drones near U.S. warships amid Strait of Hormuz tensions]]>

item.title: No ceasefire in Lebanon while Israeli attacks ongoing, says Hezbollah
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Lebanon's most senior Shi'ite politician says no to negotiations with Israel until war stops
- Lebanon's most senior Shi'ite politician says no to negotiations with Israel until war stops
- Lebanon’s most senior Shi’ite politician says no to negotiations with Israel until war stops
- Hezbollah says it will not abide by negotiations, vows to confront “any conspiracy”]]>
